subject: fix(theme): use text-primary-content on bg-primary buttons
body:
MessageInfoModal Close button and ChatHeaderMenu Save button used
text-base-content and text-base-100 respectively on bg-primary
backgrounds. The correct semantic pairing is text-primary-content
which guarantees contrast on the primary background across all
theme combos.

Tags: theme, bugfix, semantic-tokens
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
